opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is fluttering wildly in my chest, I can't catch my breath, and my knuckles have been aching terribly all week.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The racing, skipping heartbeat and the breathlessness came on suddenly a few hours ago and it hasn't settled — I'm a bit frightened being on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: the racing, irregular heartbeat and breathlessness started suddenly about 4 hours ago; the tiredness and aching joints have built up slowly over the past year
symptom_narrative.duration: the heart and breathing symptoms about 4 hours; the fatigue and joint aches around 12 months
symptom_narrative.character: my heart feels like it is fluttering and skipping really fast and irregularly, my chest feels full, and I get short of breath even just sitting; my knuckles ache and feel stiff
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the heart racing and breathlessness are the worst part and are scaring me; the joint aches are a constant nuisance
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: pounding in the chest and a fullness there; breathlessness; aching mainly in the knuckles of both hands; a dull ache under the right ribs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the palpitations and breathlessness are constant since they started 4 hours ago; the tiredness and aches are there most days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far; resting in the recliner has not settled the heart
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking to the front door leaves me really breathless
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very low energy and feeling drained for months, a dull ache under the right ribs, and I've completely gone off sex this past year
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had my heart do this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: resting in the recliner, breathless just walking across the room

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently told by my doctor that I have diabetes
past_medical_history.how_managed: just started on tablets and a long-acting insulin

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about passing out on his own if the heart keeps racing

objective_data_offered.value: skin on the arms and face looks a slate-grey / bronze colour compared with old photos
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: colour impression over a video call in ambient lighting; not a clinician-assessed finding

objective_data_offered.value: knuckles of the 2nd and 3rd fingers on both hands look a little swollen and bony
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-directed camera view of the hands; not an examined joint

objective_data_offered.value: he says his pulse at the wrist feels fast and 'all over the place', not regular
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-palpated pulse impression, not a measured or monitored rhythm
